banner.translationPending: Translation pending — please use English for now or contact your caseworker.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.instructions: Read each question to the candidate. Score 0–5 based on the evidence they describe. Capture observable changes and supporting practices in their own words.
assessment.observableChangesHint: What has changed for the candidate? (concrete, observable)
assessment.practicesHint: What is the candidate doing differently? What supports it?

domainDescriptions.employment: Capacity to access, sustain and progress in paid work.
domainDescriptions.housing: Capacity to secure and maintain stable housing.
domainDescriptions.education: Capacity to acquire and use skills and qualifications.
domainDescriptions.health: Physical and mental health, agency over wellbeing.
domainDescriptions.belonging: Sense of belonging, identity, dignity in community.
domainDescriptions.rights: Knowledge and exercise of rights, citizenship pathway.

measurements.digital_literacy: Can the person use digital tools relevant to their goals?
measurements.self_efficacy: Does the person believe in their ability to act effectively?
measurements.english_fluency: Can the person communicate effectively in English for context-appropriate tasks?
measurements.work_readiness: Is the person ready to enter UK employment?
measurements.sector_knowledge: Does the person understand their target sector?
measurements.professional_network: Does the person have professional contacts in their target sector?
measurements.workplace_cultural_fluency: Can the person read UK workplace norms?
measurements.right_to_work_clarity: Are right-to-work documents and employer-side clarity in place?
measurements.vacancy_access: Can the person reach vacancies matched to their capability?
measurements.housing_literacy: Does the person understand UK housing rights and processes?
measurements.housing_support_network: Does the person have people to call on for housing help?
measurements.tenure_stability: Is the person in stable, secure accommodation?
measurements.housing_affordability: Is the person able to meet housing costs sustainably?
measurements.learning_disposition: Is the person disposed to and confident with learning?
measurements.credential_recognition: Are the person's prior qualifications recognised or being recognised in the UK?
measurements.access_to_learning: Can the person access appropriate UK learning provision?
measurements.peer_learning_network: Does the person have peers they learn alongside?
measurements.health_literacy: Does the person understand how to access and use UK health services?
measurements.mental_wellbeing: How is the person's mental wellbeing?
measurements.physical_health: How is the person's physical health and self-care?
measurements.access_to_care: Can the person access the care they need?
measurements.trauma_informed_support: Does the person have trauma-informed support?
measurements.identity_security: Does the person have a settled sense of self in the UK context?
measurements.cultural_anchoring: Does the person feel anchored in their cultural community?
measurements.community_acceptance: Does the person feel accepted by the wider local community?
measurements.civic_participation: Does the person participate in civic life?
measurements.social_connections: Does the person have meaningful social connections?
measurements.trust_in_institutions: Does the person trust local institutions?
measurements.rights_literacy: Does the person understand their rights?
measurements.legal_status_clarity: Is the person's legal status clear and stable?
measurements.advocacy_access: Can the person access advocacy when needed?
measurements.citizenship_pathway: Does the person have a clear pathway toward citizenship?
